task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Canned Responses section in the Omnichannel administration area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Canned Responses' page is open within the Omnichannel administration settings.

A form or list entry showing the shortcut '!refund_policy', the exact text 'Full refunds are available for 30 days after purchase. Please visit https://docs.rocket.chat/refunds for details.', and the scope set to Public.
A form or list entry showing the shortcut '!office_hours', the exact text 'Support agents are available Monday through Friday, 09:00 to 17:00 UTC.', and the scope set to Public.

task_completion.description: Verify both canned responses are successfully created and listed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Canned Responses list displays both '!refund_policy' and '!office_hours' shortcuts.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface to create the responses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is the genuine Rocket.Chat platform, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent configured the responses in the admin settings, rather than just sending them as chat messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The responses are entered in the Omnichannel Canned Responses configuration area, not typed into a standard chat window.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected Canned Responses:
1. Shortcut: '!refund_policy', Text: 'Full refunds are available for 30 days after purchase. Please visit https://docs.rocket.chat/refunds for details.', Scope: Public (global).
2. Shortcut: '!office_hours', Text: 'Support agents are available Monday through Friday, 09:00 to 17:00 UTC.', Scope: Public (global).
